since_last: 67% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.10% · Gold +0.48% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 67% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.12%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.12%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: PUBM is the standout at +8.05%
cards.body: Leaders: PUBM +8.05%, SKHY +5.16%, MU +4.74%, AMD +3.48%, BIDU +3.42%. Laggards: SAP -2.04%, WDAY -1.66%, NOW -1.53%, CRM -1.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.22% at $125.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
